name: Graham, NC
notes: 10F's first ground-up build. 15,600 sqft, fully automated from day one. Leased up in ~5 months at a pace of ~1 rental/day — twice the company's pro forma. Industry benchmark reference for the entire automated-storage playbook.

name: Georgetown, TX
notes: Class-A multi-story. Punch list active. Expected Certificate of Occupancy Q3 2025 per Q2 press release. Lease-up plan modeled on Graham pace, adjusted for unit count.

name: Dripping Springs, TX
notes: Class-A multi-story. Hill Country growth market. Seeded asset of the Opportunistic Offering ($25M first close, led by Essentia Capital Partners). Punch list begins Q3 2026.

name: Richmond Hill, GA
notes: Class-A multi-story, Savannah metro. One of four GA development sites named in Q2 2025 announcement. Vertical construction in progress.

name: Villa Rica, GA
notes: Class-A multi-story, Atlanta MSA west corridor. Named in the Q2 2025 active pipeline. Vertical construction underway.

name: Temple, GA
notes: Class-A multi-story, west of Atlanta along I-20. Named in the Q2 2025 active pipeline. Earlier construction stage.

name: Charlotte, NC
notes: Class-A multi-story, urban infill. Seeded asset of the Opportunistic Offering alongside Dripping Springs. Permitting in progress; site work expected Q4 2026.

name: Lake Worth, TX
notes: Class-A multi-story, DFW Metroplex. Groundbreaking expected per Q2 2025 release. Strengthens Texas footprint alongside the recently-acquired Keller portfolio (3 properties, 177k NRSF).
